Celebrate the iconic prints, rich history, and endless inspiration of Liberty fabrics - the perfect dose of creativity and colour!
Kathryn Ross is back on Sewing Street with some gorgeous Cotton Fairy kits & patterns.
Discover the essential tools every maker needs!
Join Kathryn Ross for a second hour with some more gorgeous Cotton Fairy kits & patterns.
Discover the versatility of overlockers and simple stitching techniques in this inspiring hour on Sewing Street.
One of the most exciting brands in UK craft today, Jamie Rodgers Crafts aim is to inspire with his products, ideas and techniques!
Specialising in innovative products, Katy Sue Designs and manufactures award-winning silicone moulds and paper craft products for creative people worldwide.
Emlems Silicone Moulds is a family run UK business who create beautiful, high quality, sturdy handmade moulds right here in the UK.
Samantha K Crafts are here for some mixed media fun, MDF, Chipboard, Ricepapers and more.

programmes.show_name: Tilly and the Buttons Frida Shirt
programmes.show_description: Katharine Wright joins us today to demonstrate the Tilly and the Buttons Frida Shirt.
Discover beautiful fabrics perfect for creating garments that fit, flatter, and feel wonderful to wear, from flowing prints to structured classics for every style and season.
...Kit: Katharine Wright is back for a second hour demonstrating the stunning Riley Blake Fairy Village Quilt Kit.

programmes.show_name: Creative Grids Rulers on Split Pay
programmes.show_description: Upgrade your quilting toolkit with Creative Grids rulers, now available on Split Pay for extra convenience!
Based in County Durham Crafter's Companion strives to create products to make crafting easier, more enjoyable, and beautifully rewarding. Tune in to find out what's new!
